ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., Crawler crane, Truck crane) */,
  "crane_capacity_tonne" REAL /* Maximum load capacity in tonnes for cranes */,
  "number_of_equipment" INTEGER /* Total number of units for the specific type of equipment */,
  "equipment_category" TEXT /* Category of equipment */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Equipment ID referencing the equipment being operated */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., Base, Top) */,
  "operation_description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Equipment ID referencing the equipment requiring maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance required (e.g., Routine, Repair) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "estimated_time_required" REAL /* Estimated time required for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Equipment ID referencing the equipment being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID where the equipment is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was used */,
  "hours_used" REAL /* Total number of hours the equipment was used */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the operator who used the equipment */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the project manager assigned to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_logs_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the project manager assigned to the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Equipment Manager, Project Manager) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance_history" (
  "maintenance_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance history entry */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Equipment ID referencing the equipment being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_history_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Equipment ID referencing the equipment being allocated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID referencing the project being allocated to */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of allocation */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_allocations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
